creator: lidl@FreeBSD.org
text:
I originally reported this problem against the image:

FreeBSD-10.2-PRERELEASE-sparc64-20150625-r284813-disc1.iso

I have re-verified that the problem occurs with this image too:

FreeBSD-10.2-PRERELEASE-sparc64-20150630-r284970-disc1.iso

The same thing seems to be happening.  If I comment out
the IPv6 configuration in /etc/rc.conf on the newer image (r284970),
the machine doesn't panic when booting.
